label: Ashscreen Supply Niche
description: Ashscreen Supply Niche is a sealed storage room recessed into the black slagcrete shell of Riftward Sleepcell, its entry framed with scuffed vitrified panels and compressive gaskets to hold back grit. Modular lockers and stacked crate-bays line the walls in rigid grids, their faces stamped with stenciled inventory fields and impact-scarred corner guards. Overhead, exposed conduit runs and vox-shielding mesh continue uninterrupted, and grit-proof louvers cast the space in low, regulated light. The air remains dry and filtered, carrying the permanent tang of ozone and stone dust drawn through ash-screened intake ducting.
